notes_md:
**nhắn** = to send a (short) message or tell someone something briefly. It’s usually about texting or passing on a quick message.

It often goes with **cho + person** (the receiver).  

Very common in **nhắn tin** = to text (send a text message). Compared to **gửi** (send), *nhắn* feels shorter and more personal; compared to **báo**, it’s less formal and more casual.
exampleSentencesTranslated: I will message you when I arrive safely.
Can you message your friend the address of the coffee shop?
Message mom to let her know you will be home late today.

definitions.vi: Gửi một tin nhắn hoặc ghi chú cho ai đó.
definitions.es: Enviar un mensaje o nota a alguien.
definitions.en: To send a message or note to someone.

example.vi: Tôi sẽ nhắn cho bạn sau.
example.es: Te enviaré un mensaje más tarde.

notes:
nhắn = to send a (short) message or tell someone something briefly. It’s usually about texting or passing on a quick message.

It often goes with cho + person (the receiver).  

Very common in nhắn tin = to text (send a text message). Compared to gửi (send), nhắn feels shorter and more personal; compared to báo, it’s less formal and more casual.
exampleSentences: Anh sẽ nhắn cho em khi anh đến nơi an toàn.
Chị có thể nhắn cho bạn địa chỉ của quán cà phê không?
Em nhắn cho mẹ biết rằng em sẽ về muộn hôm nay nhé.
